items.headline: East campus after-school hours extended to 6 PM
items.detail: More room for Tue/Wed/Thu mentoring sessions on the east campus.

items.headline: District grant supports STEM tutoring
items.detail: Math and science mentoring sessions are reimbursable this semester.

items.headline: Bus route 12 schedule change
items.detail: Later pickup near east campus; mentors should plan sessions to end by 5:45 PM.
